texto: The car rolled slowly along the deserted corniche, headlights cleaving its way through Beirut by night. In gentle swerves to avoid potholes, the Mercedes waltzed along a straight road in a dance of death. Sick palm trees and parched grass divided the tarred road of civilization. The sea alone was testimony to God’s beautiful creation. But in its belly, corpses, limbs, garbage, and ordnance mingled with a sea life on the verge of extinction.
explicacao: Citação de Dana K. Haffar sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “The car rolled slowly along the deserted corniche, headlights cleaving its way through Beirut by …” articula reflexao, chaos, destruction em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como boa-noite e luto.
